summary: Iteration 10 testing complete: All billing cycle and annual review features working correctly. Backend 11/11 tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Add Member modal with billing section (montant, méthode, cycle, valeur) and annual review switch. Renewal modal with 'Modifier le cycle de facturation' option. Auto-creation of payment_schedule and annual_review working.
critical_code_review_comments: Member creation with billing_cycle_type (monthly_day or interval_days) working correctly
billing_cycle_value supports day of month (1-28) for monthly_day or interval in days
Auto-creation of payment_schedule when billing_enabled=true with correct recurrence_type and recurrence_value
Auto-creation of annual_review when annual_review_enabled=true with status='scheduled'
annual_review_date calculated as 1 year from contract_signed_date
Member update properly updates payment_schedule when billing changes
Renewal endpoint supports updating billing cycle via billing_cycle_type, billing_cycle_value, billing_amount, billing_payment_method
Renewal creates new annual_review if member has annual_review_enabled=true
seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary data with TEST_ prefix and cleanup after
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: (1) Member creation with billing_cycle: POST /api/members accepts billing_cycle_type (monthly_day or interval_days) and billing_cycle_value. Auto-creates payment_schedule if billing_enabled=true and billing_amount>0. (2) Member update with billing cycle: PUT /api/members/{id} updates payment_schedule when billing fields change. (3) Annual review: Auto-creates annual_review when annual_review_enabled=true. Review date set to 1 year from contract_signed_date. (4) Renewal: POST /api/members/{id}/renew supports billing_cycle_type, billing_cycle_value, billing_amount, billing_payment_method to update billing on renewal. Creates new annual_review if annual_review_enabled. Frontend: Modal d'ajout/édition shows billing section with toggle, amount, method, cycle type dropdown, and cycle value input. Also shows 'Bilan annuel' toggle. Renewal modal has 'Modifier le cycle de facturation' toggle that expands billing fields when enabled.

features_tested.payment_schedule_auto_created: PASS - PaymentSchedule created with correct amount, recurrence_type, recurrence_value
features_tested.no_schedule_when_billing_disabled: PASS - No schedule created when billing_enabled=false
features_tested.annual_review_auto_created: PASS - AnnualReview created with status='scheduled', review_date=contract_date+1year
features_tested.no_annual_review_when_disabled: PASS - No review created when annual_review_enabled=false
features_tested.update_member_billing_cycle: PASS - Member and PaymentSchedule updated when billing cycle changed
features_tested.simple_renewal: PASS - Subscription extended without billing change
features_tested.renewal_with_billing_update: PASS - Billing cycle updated during renewal
features_tested.renewal_creates_annual_review: PASS - New AnnualReview created on renewal if annual_review_enabled
features_tested.renewal_history_recorded: PASS - MemberRenewalHistory recorded with previous/new dates
features_tested.frontend_add_member_modal_billing_sectio: PASS - Montant, Méthode, Cycle, Valeur fields visible
features_tested.frontend_add_member_modal_annual_review_: PASS - Bilan annuel toggle visible with helper text
features_tested.frontend_renewal_modal_billing_option: PASS - 'Modifier le cycle de facturation' toggle visible
features_tested.frontend_renewal_modal_billing_fields: PASS - Billing fields appear when toggle enabled
features_tested.ui_member_creation_e2e: PASS - Created member via UI with billing and annual review, verified via API
